news.title: RLYB Stock Hits 2-Year Highs After Unveiling Merger With Avenzo – How Much Of The New Company Will Rallybio Shareholders Own?
RallyBio tries again for reverse merger, this time with Avenzo
Rallybio Agrees to Acquire Avenzo Therapeutics
Rallybio Corporation and Avenzo Therapeutics Announce Merger Agreement to Advance Next-Generation Oncology Therapies and $215 Million Concurrent Private Placement
